rules.name: Herr_Person
rules.description: Captures names following 'Herr' or 'Herrn'. Extracts only the name (group 1), excluding the title.

rules.name: General_Person_Context
rules.description: Captures person names following common legal verbs or prepositions that are not covered by specific title rules. Tightened to exclude non-persons.

rules.name: Frau_Person
rules.description: Captures names following 'Frau' or 'Frauen' to extract the name without the title.

rules.name: Preposition_Person
rules.description: Captures person names following other prepositions like 'aus', 'mit', 'bei', 'nach', 'ohne', 'durch', 'gegenüber'. Excludes 'Herr', 'Herrn', 'Frau', 'Frauen' and legal entities.

rules.name: Role_Person
rules.description: Captures person names following specific legal roles or abbreviations. Excludes 'Herr', 'Herrn', 'Frau', 'Frauen' and legal entities. Excludes cases where a title precedes the name.

rules.name: Name_With_Suffix
rules.description: Captures names with academic or professional suffixes like ', BA', ', Bakk. art.', ', MBA' that appear after a title or in case contexts. Excludes 'Frau' and 'Herr' from the name start.

rules.name: Genitive_Person
rules.description: Captures person names in genitive case. Excludes common nouns and legal entities.

rules.name: Date_Person
rules.description: Captures person names immediately following a date pattern (e.g., '22.9.2016 Ida Vetterlin').

rules.name: Pronoun_Person
rules.description: Captures person names following pronouns like 'Er', 'Sie', 'Es' or in parentheses. Refined to avoid matching common nouns.

rules.name: Zu_Person
rules.description: Captures person names following the preposition 'zu' (to) in contexts like 'Zu Pascal Tiessen'.

rules.name: Herr_Abbrev_Person
rules.description: Captures names following the abbreviation 'Hr.' (Herr).

rules.name: HR_Person
rules.description: Captures 'HR' (Hauptreferent) followed by a name, including titles like KzlR and multi-word names. Updated to handle 'Techn R' prefix.

rules.name: RgR_Person
rules.description: Specifically captures 'RgR' (Regierungsrat) followed by a name, excluding cases where HR follows (handled by HR_Person).

rules.name: Herrn_Frau_Person
rules.description: Captures names following 'Herrn' or 'Frau', allowing for optional titles including 'Techn R'.

rules.name: Dr_in_Person
rules.description: Captures 'Dr.in' followed by a name, including the title in the output. Fixed to handle 'Dr.in Mag.a' patterns and trim trailing spaces.

rules.name: Nach_Person
rules.description: Captures person names appearing after 'nach' (e.g., 'Verlassenschaft nach dem...'), indicating a deceased person or heir. Updated to handle 'des' and 'der'.

rules.name: Mandantin_Person
rules.description: Captures person names appearing after 'Mandantin' or 'Mandant' (e.g., 'meiner Mandantin, Frau Livia Roux').

rules.name: Nachname_Wie_Bf_Person
rules.description: Captures person names appearing after the specific legal marker '(Nachname wie Bf.)'.

rules.name: Sohn_Person
rules.description: Captures person names appearing after 'Sohn' (son) in contexts like 'meinem Sohn', 'Ihr Sohn'.

rules.name: Gegen_Person_Fixed
rules.description: Captures person names after 'gegen', strictly requiring a capitalized name and excluding common nouns like 'Firma' or 'Gesellschaft'.

rules.name: Party_Name_No_Title
rules.description: Captures person names following 'für' (for) or 'Kinder' (children) in family contexts, handling un-titled names.

rules.name: Complex_Title_Person
rules.description: Captures names with complex titles. Strictly excludes legal entities, locations, and common nouns. Requires a known title prefix.

rules.name: Von_Person
rules.description: Captures person names appearing after 'von', strictly requiring a capitalized name to filter out common nouns. Excludes the trigger word 'von' and honorifics like 'Herrn', 'Frau'. Added 'Alternativen' to exclusion list.

rules.name: Fuer_Person_Fixed
rules.description: Captures person names after 'f\u00fcr', strictly requiring a capitalized name to filter out common nouns. Excludes the trigger word 'f\u00fcr'.

rules.name: Title_Person_General_Fixed
rules.description: Captures names with titles. Updated to explicitly handle 'KommR Ing.' as a single unit to prevent partial matching. Prioritizes complex titles. Excludes legal entities.

rules.name: StR_Person
rules.description: Captures names with 'StR' (Strafrecht) title. Fixed to stop capturing addresses.
